profiles.short_bio: Chris Dyer is a keynote speaker, 4x bestselling author, and former 5x Inc. 5000 CEO. He is known for leadership and culture keynotes built around his Moments That Matter methodology and 7 Pillars of Amazing Culture framework.
profiles.long_bio:
Chris Dyer is an American keynote speaker focused on leadership and organizational culture. He is a 4x bestselling author and former 5x Inc. 5000 CEO, giving him direct executive-level perspective on performance, growth, and team culture.

He has delivered more than 300 keynotes across 20+ countries, supporting corporate audiences seeking practical ideas for leadership meetings, offsites, and culture events. His speaking profile is reinforced by recognized 2026 placements, including #1 Leadership Speaker to Follow in 2026 by MSN.com and #15 on the Global Gurus Top 30 Organizational Culture Professionals for 2026.

Dyer’s work centers on the Moments That Matter methodology and the 7 Pillars of Amazing Culture framework. These positioning points make his message especially relevant for organizations looking to connect culture with measurable leadership outcomes.

His client history includes organizations such as NASA, Johnson & Johnson, Southwest Airlines, IKEA, General Motors, Intuit, and MetLife. That breadth of corporate experience supports his fit for conference planners seeking a proven leadership and culture keynote with broad business appeal.

profiles.short_bio: Laila Ali is a world-class athlete and top motivational keynote speaker. She is also a TV host and cooking enthusiast with a broad public profile across wellness, hosting, and lifestyle.
profiles.long_bio:
Laila Ali is an American athlete whose profile extends beyond sports into speaking, hosting, and lifestyle media. Verified research identifies her as a world-class athlete and a top motivational keynote speaker, making her a strong fit for audiences looking for credibility and inspiration.

Her on-camera experience includes hosting Late Nite Chef Fight on FYI Network, and she is also recognized as a cooking enthusiast. That combination gives her added appeal for buyer use cases that blend entertainment, wellness, and food-lifestyle programming.

Laila Ali is the founder of the Laila Ali Lifestyle Brand, adding a consumer-facing brand layer to her public platform. She also made her feature film acting debut in Falcon Rising, demonstrating a cross-category presence that can support broader event and activation concepts.

Her background and visibility create booking appeal for corporate events, wellness programs, brand activations, and hosted experiences. She is also a mother of two, which is part of her public personal profile.

profiles.genre: stand-up comedian, actress, and former NFL cheerleader
profiles.short_bio: Anjelah Johnson-Reyes is an American actress, stand-up comedian, and author. She is also a former NFL cheerleader known for her work in comedy, television, and film.
profiles.long_bio:
Anjelah Johnson-Reyes is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and author with a career spanning comedy, television, and film. She is widely recognized for her broad audience appeal and event-friendly background as a former NFL cheerleader.

Her comedy has reached large online audiences, including the viral video “Nail Salon,” which has more than 47 million views. Her special “Say I Won’t” on YouTube has also amassed more than 7.1 million views.

These verified performance metrics make her a strong fit for corporate entertainment, galas, and brand-focused programming. Her profile was updated in 2026 on a major speaker bureau site, reflecting continued booking relevance.

Research used for this profile highlights her as a strong option for buyer segments seeking recognizable comedy talent with crossover appeal. Her background supports editorial positioning for conference entertainment, private events, and other audience-facing programs.
